title: Feature for Chat (MS Teams/Slack) - Individual Team members or Groups
excerpt:
Can we have a Chat Feature with individual team members, groups of team members, and Specified team members on Monday. 
Basically would like to eliminate MS teams from our workflow process and have it right within Monday…

posts.author: Dan1 (Danim Ahmed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we have a Chat Feature with individual team members, groups of team members, and Specified team members on Monday.

Basically would like to eliminate MS teams from our workflow process and have it right within Monday. You can have a whole separate Module /Product for this, but it must easily integrated with all other products seamlessly. Maybe a chat Icon next to the notifications Icon on the top bar.

Monday already has the skeleton build it from the “@” features that already exists. Would be happy to pay a fee for something like this so we don’t have to go to another software for chatting and eliminate MS Teams from our day to day and just live within the Monday eco.

posts.author: AlexRevApps (Alexander Infante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Great idea about improving team communication on monday.com! As a monday.com partner, I completely relate to what you’re saying.

This need actually inspired me to create an app called SecureChat Pro. It adds lightweight chat functionality directly within monday.com. It’s designed to enable those quick conversations without leaving the platform. I’m also very focused on security, so everything is fully encrypted end to end.

Some features that sound like they could help you are:

  • Privacy settings that allow you to invite specific team members, or leave it open to the entire group
  • Online and typing statuses so you know when people are active
  • Notifications for mentions/ tagging (@name) and notifications when someone is added to a private chat
  • Emojis for reactions and natively
  • Media sharing (PDFs, images, videos, audio files, and GIFs)
  • More features are about to be rolled out this week too!

It’s available in the app marketplace with a 14 day free trial

auth.monday.com

SecureChat Pro - Private Chat - monday.com App Marketplace

Private & Encrypted Messaging for Your Team 🔒 🚀

I’m really big on giving too- so we fit this to be an affordable price. If you do want a further discount, let’s find a time to connect and I’d be happy to chat about that as well.

Feel free to email me at alexander@revapps.io
